summary: Iteration 101 - Navigation Refactor Testing. Verified 5 grouped dropdown menus (Workspace, Plan, AI Agents, Build, Insights) replace flat 31-tab nav bar. All P0 backend integrations verified working (agent_prompt_builder, tool gating, agent context builder). MarketplacePage uses api instance correctly. .env.example files exist for both frontend and backend.
critical_code_review_comments: WorkspacePage.js NAV_MENUS constant (lines 60-134) defines 5 dropdown groups with correct structure: workspace (5 items), plan (7 items), agents (10 items), build (8 items), insights (8 items)
WorkspacePage.js dropdown rendering (lines 498-554) uses proper data-testid attributes: nav-menu-{id} for menu buttons, tab-{key} for items
Click outside handler (lines 182-195) uses menuRef to detect clicks and setOpenMenu(null) to close
Escape key handler (line 187) properly closes dropdown via document.addEventListener('keydown')
Active tab shows cyan highlight with breadcrumb: 'Plan / Projects' pattern implemented correctly
MarketplacePage.js (line 3) correctly imports api from '@/lib/api' instead of using fetch()
MarketplacePage.js uses handleSilent from errorHandler throughout (line 4)
collaboration_core.py (lines 231-238) correctly calls build_agent_prompt for nexus agents with skills
routes_ai_tools.py (lines 370-388) implements tool access gating checking denied_tools and allowed_tools arrays from nexus_agents collection
agent_context_builder.py (lines 96-106) includes skill profile in context block via db.agent_skills query

success_rate.frontend: 100% (6/6 dropdown navigation tests passed via Playwright)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Tool_Gated_Agent with denied_tools and allowed_tools during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation refactor complete and verified. The flat 31-tab nav bar has been replaced with 5 grouped dropdown menus. Each dropdown opens on click, closes on click outside, closes on Escape, and correctly activates tabs. Active tab shows cyan highlight with breadcrumb in parent menu (e.g., 'Plan / Projects'). All data-testid attributes preserved for automation testing. Backend P0 features verified: 1) agent_prompt_builder called in collaboration_core.py for Nexus agents with skills, 2) Tool access gating in routes_ai_tools.py checks denied_tools and allowed_tools, 3) agent_context_builder.py includes skill profile. MarketplacePage uses api instance throughout instead of fetch().

frontend_dropdown_navigation.data_testid_preserved: PASS - nav-menu-{id} for menus, tab-{key} for items

backend_p0_agent_prompt_builder.code: if nexus_agent.get('skills'): enriched_prompt = await build_agent_prompt(_db, nexus_agent, _workspace_id, _channel_id)
backend_p0_agent_prompt_builder.status: VERIFIED - build_agent_prompt called for Nexus agents with skills

backend_p0_tool_gating.code: checks denied_tools and allowed_tools from nexus_agents collection
backend_p0_tool_gating.status: VERIFIED - returns error if tool is in denied_tools or not in allowed_tools

backend_p0_agent_context_builder.status: VERIFIED - skill profile included in context block

p2_marketplace_api_usage.status: VERIFIED - uses api.get/api.post throughout, handleSilent for error handling

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are using real backend endpoints
